evals.prompt: 在我的 Mac 上给 Codex 安装现有 dream 皮肤，启动后截图验证，但如果 Codex 已打开不要擅自重启。
evals.expected_output: Uses the macOS scripts, preserves the signed app, asks before restart, and verifies the selected theme with a screenshot.
expectations: Uses install-skin.sh, start-skin.sh, and verify-skin.sh with theme dream
Does not modify ChatGPT.app or restart an open app without authorization
Treats screenshot and strict runtime verification as required

evals.prompt: 参考我给的一张海边照片，帮我做一个低饱和蓝绿色的 Codex 皮肤，名字叫 ocean-calm，文案不要明星元素。
evals.expected_output: Scaffolds an ocean-calm theme, uses local or generated artwork with consent, customizes manifest and CSS, increments version, and verifies visually.
expectations: Creates a separate ocean-calm manifest and CSS instead of overwriting Dream
Uses safe local artwork handling and removes Fiona-specific copy
Preserves native controls and performs screenshot verification

evals.prompt: Codex 更新后皮肤只有侧边栏变粉了，首页横幅没了，帮我修复并确保以后不会假通过。
evals.expected_output: Diagnoses selector drift, updates the narrow compatibility selectors, and requires native-home hero/cards to pass verification.
expectations: Does not claim that dynamic executable discovery guarantees DOM compatibility
Validates native home detection, hero, and suggestion cards
Rechecks both home and normal-task layouts

evals.prompt: 把刚做好的 ocean-calm 主题导出成一个可以发给 Windows 用户直接导入的 .codex-theme 文件，不要依赖我本机的图片路径。
evals.expected_output: Validates the theme and uses export-theme.mjs to create a self-contained portable package with embedded CSS and artwork.
expectations: Uses scripts/export-theme.mjs with theme ocean-calm and an explicit .codex-theme output path
Produces a single package containing the normalized manifest, CSS, and Base64 artwork
Does not leave absolute source-machine asset paths in the portable manifest

evals.prompt: 我不想一直保留皮肤。帮我在 Mac 上关闭当前 Codex 皮肤，并恢复安装前的基础主题配置。
evals.expected_output: Uses the restore script, removes live injection, restores saved base theme settings, and does not touch Codex threads or authentication.
expectations: Uses scripts/restore-skin.sh with --restore-base-theme when the user asks for base theme restore
Explains that --uninstall removes generated launch shortcuts
Does not delete user threads, credentials, or unrelated Codex config
